fields.options: Master switches for tatva_connect event automations. Keep OFF in production until the historical-lead migration is complete, so automations don't fire on backfilled data. Turn ON afterwards.

fields.description: When ON, an inbound WhatsApp message (linked to a lead) auto-creates one open follow-up task for the lead's owner. Default OFF.
fields.label: Enable Follow-up Task Automation (WhatsApp → task)
WhatsApp Template Send Caps (manual rep sends)

fields.description: Max template messages a rep may MANUALLY send to one patient number per rolling hour. Blank = code default (5). 0 = no hourly cap. Automated notifications are never capped.
fields.label: Template Cap / Hour / Number

fields.description: Max template messages a rep may MANUALLY send to one patient number per rolling day. Blank = code default (10). 0 = no daily cap.
fields.label: Template Cap / Day / Number
